cycle.note: Cycle start is derived from the earliest logged review (see server.py). Week 1 focal = Temperance. One focal virtue every 7 days, looping to Temperance again at week 24 (pass 2). day_cutoff_hour: a review opened before this local hour defaults to the previous calendar day (so a 1am review counts for the day that just ended). The date picker can override to any day.

virtues.name: Temperance
virtues.precept: Eat not to dullness; drink not to elevation.
virtues.dot: Dot if you ate past fullness or drank to a clouded head.

virtues.name: Vigor
virtues.precept: Train and eat to plan regardless of mood.
virtues.dot: Dot if mood, not circumstance, broke the plan.

virtues.name: Order
virtues.precept: Let all your things have their places; let each part of your business have its time.
virtues.dot: Dot if a thing had no place or a task had no time.

virtues.name: Focus/Closure
virtues.precept: Pursue one task to completion before opening another; leave nothing at 90%.
virtues.dot: Dot if you abandoned mid-task or impulse-switched.

virtues.name: Capture
virtues.precept: Record every stray idea or obligation the moment it appears; trust the system, not memory.
virtues.dot: Dot if something lived only in your head and you lost or nearly lost it.

virtues.name: Resolution
virtues.precept: Resolve to perform what you ought; perform without fail what you resolve.
virtues.dot: Dot if you broke a thing you had resolved to do.

virtues.name: Industry
virtues.precept: Lose no time; be always employ'd in something useful; cut off all unnecessary actions.
virtues.dot: Dot if time bled into nothing useful.

virtues.name: Frugality
virtues.precept: Make no expense but to do good to others or yourself; waste nothing.
virtues.dot: Dot if you spent on nothing that did good.

virtues.name: Rigor
virtues.precept: Verify before asserting; no confident bluffing.
virtues.dot: Dot if you stated as fact what you hadn't checked.
virtues.bite: Did I verify to be right, or to be seen as the one who's right?

virtues.name: Sincerity
virtues.precept: Use no hurtful deceit; think innocently and justly, and, if you speak, speak accordingly.
virtues.dot: Dot if a word of yours bent the truth.

virtues.name: Steelmanning
virtues.precept: State the opposing case better than its holder before you answer it.
virtues.dot: Dot if you attacked a weakened version.
virtues.bite: To understand, or to perform a superior takedown?

virtues.name: Teachability
virtues.precept: Assume the other knows something you don't until proven otherwise.
virtues.dot: Dot if you closed to someone before hearing them out.

virtues.name: Justice
virtues.precept: Wrong none by doing injuries, or omitting the benefits that are your duty.
virtues.dot: Dot if you wronged someone, or skipped a good you owed.

virtues.name: Receptivity
virtues.precept: Accept correction without defending, redirecting, or explaining.
virtues.dot: Dot if you met a correction with a 'but' or a counter.

virtues.name: Gratitude
virtues.precept: Name unearned goods today; refuse the self-made story.
virtues.dot: Dot if the day passed without naming what you didn't earn.

virtues.name: Prayerfulness
virtues.precept: Keep the rule without negotiation, especially when things go well.
virtues.dot: Dot if you skipped or shortened the rule, most of all on a good day.

virtues.name: Stewardship
virtues.precept: Maintain what's entrusted to you; let nothing decay through neglect.
virtues.dot: Dot if something in your care degraded because you ignored it.

virtues.name: Chastity
virtues.precept: Rarely use venery but for health or offspring; never to dullness, weakness, or the injury of your own or another's peace or reputation.
virtues.dot: Dot if appetite, not love or health, drove the act.

virtues.name: Silence
virtues.precept: Speak not but what may benefit others or yourself; avoid trifling conversation.
virtues.dot: Dot if you imposed, asserted, or chattered to no benefit.

virtues.name: Moderation
virtues.precept: Avoid extremes; forbear resenting injuries so much as you think they deserve.
virtues.dot: Dot if you went to an extreme, or nursed a resentment.

virtues.name: Cleanliness
virtues.precept: Tolerate no uncleanliness in body, clothes, or habitation.
virtues.dot: Dot if body, clothes, or space went unkempt.

virtues.name: Tranquillity
virtues.precept: Be not disturbed at trifles, or at accidents common or unavoidable.
virtues.dot: Dot if a trifle disturbed your peace.

virtues.name: Humility
virtues.precept: Imitate Jesus and Socrates.
virtues.dot: Dot if pride showed, in word or in the quiet wish to be seen.
virtues.bite: Franklin never beat this one, only its appearance. The open question.
